skills.name: join_monster_rallies
skills.description: Navigate to Alliance War Monster War and join forming boss-monster rallies with the saved preset, then return to city.

skills.name: open_monster_war
skills.description: Open the Alliance War Monster War screen to view forming boss-monster rallies.

skills.name: dismiss_popups
skills.description: Dismiss blocking purchase popups, reward banners, dialogs, and menus to reveal the city.

skills.name: exit_ideal_land
skills.description: Leave the decorative Ideal Land area and return to the main city.

skills.name: read_city_stats
skills.description: Read city HUD resources, power, gems, and VIP stats without changing the game state.

skills.name: detect_buildings
skills.description: Detect candidate city building locations in the current frame without tapping anything.

skills.name: classify_screen
skills.description: Classify the current game screen into a learned state label using local vision and OCR.
